greeting: Hey there! I'm the virtual receptionist at Mod Mutt Salon. How can I help you and your pet today? 🐾

faq.a: Yes! We're appointment-only for all grooming services. Nail trims are walk-in, daily between 11 AM and 2 PM.
Yes! We groom both dogs and cats. We welcome pets of all ages, from puppies and kittens to seniors.

faq.q: Can I walk in for a nail trim?
faq.a: Absolutely! Walk-in nail trims are available daily between 11 AM and 2 PM.
Yes, we take special care with anxious pets. For young pets, it might take a couple visits for them to get comfortable. For senior pets, if they start stressing, we stop and call you for pickup.
We're at 109 Denson Drive in Austin, TX.

escalation: Great question! Let me have someone from the team get back to you on that.
